node.statement: SUBROUTINE 2F — Block Encoding Arithmetic (Multiplication + Linear Combination): (i) Multiplication lemma (GSLW19): given (alpha_1,a_1,eps_1)-BE of A and (alpha_2,a_2,eps_2)-BE of B, construct (alpha_1 alpha_2, a_1+a_2, alpha_1 eps_2 + alpha_2 eps_1)-BE of AB. (ii) Linear combination (GSLW19 Lemma 20): given state preparation pair (P_L,P_R) and block encodings U_j of A_j, construct BE of sum y_j A_j. Both used repeatedly in assembling H = C^{1/2}(L+A)^{-1}C^{1/2} from components (Eq 177).
